summary: Sprint 1 Ru'ya backend testing: role/looking_for on signup, JSON ProfileUpdate on PUT /users/me, and Marketplace project-requests + applications endpoints all working correctly. Sanity checks (login, feed) still pass.
passed: POST /api/auth/signup accepts role='doctor' and looking_for=[...]; response contains role, looking_for, skills=[], years_experience=0, intro_video_url='', certifications=[], portfolio=[]
PUT /api/users/me now accepts JSON ProfileUpdate; persists name, bio, role, looking_for, skills, years_experience, intro_video_url, certifications (list of dicts), portfolio (list of dicts)
POST /api/project-requests creates request with id, user_id, title, description, category, budget_min, budget_max, deadline_days, status=open, applications_count=0
GET /api/project-requests returns list with populated user; ?category=design filter returns only matching items
GET /api/project-requests/{id} returns request with user + applications (with user) populated

POST /api/project-requests/{id}/apply: 400 when applying to own request, success for other user, increments applications_count to 1, creates 'application' notification for owner, 400 on duplicate apply
